revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-810

A detector which demodulates small signals and whose output voltage is substantially proportional to the square of the voltage of the modulated input wave.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Square law detector}}
